product: New workflow for creating metric views from dashboards
tagline: Create a metric view from a dashboard dataset: Authors can now promote a dashboard dataset to a metric view using the AI/BI dashboard data tab.
what_it_does: Create a metric view from a dashboard dataset: Authors can now promote a dashboard dataset to a metric view using the AI/BI dashboard data tab. This article explains how to create and manage dashboard datasets using the dataset editor in an AI/BI dashboard. Define datasets To define or access existing datasets, click the Data tab near the upper left corner of your dashboard.
why_it_matters: Materialized views cache query results and refresh them on a specified schedule, which can reduce query execution time when the same data is accessed repeatedly.
plain_summary: Create a metric view from a dashboard dataset: Authors can now promote a dashboard dataset to a metric view using the AI/BI dashboard data tab. This article explains how to create and manage dashboard datasets using the dataset editor in an AI/BI dashboard.
